# datnguyennnx — Personal Site & Digital Garden

## About
A software engineer's personal site and digital garden. Content spans software engineering, system design, AI/ML, finance, and philosophy. Long-form notes blend technical depth with reflective writing.

## Docs / Pages
- Home: https://datnguyennnx.github.io/
- Notes: https://datnguyennnx.github.io/notes
- Settings: https://datnguyennnx.github.io/settings
- Manifesto — First Message: https://datnguyennnx.github.io/notes/myth/manifesto
